description: In a final flashback, May and Coulson, freshly escaped from their mission, banter warmly about their partnership, May’s dating life, and future possibilities. There’s a hint of unspoken affection between them as May mentions her latest romantic interest is a shrink. Their light and reflective tone contrasts with the episode’s darker revelations.

transcript.line: Yeah, but I'm not tired of hearing it yet.
Thank you for saving my ass back there.
You're welcome. All in all, I guess I could've asked for a worse assignment.
Wait. Asked? So you asked for this mission, huh? Busted. Didn't want the weekend free for quality time with random civilian number 14?
“Ugh?” Wow. You must really like this guy.
Maybe I'm tired of dating civilians.
Well, maybe if it doesn't work out with this one, you and I can talk about that, over a drink.
Chances are high. This guy is really not my type.
Yeesh. Well, let me know if it goes horribly. Here's hoping. Keep your eyes on the road.
We've waited around forever. I think that's long enough.
